# Fleuret AI

> Fleuret AI is a Paris-based sovereign EU agentic pentest platform. A multi-agent system named Émile orchestrates open-weight LLMs to run autonomous web application penetration tests end-to-end, from recon to signed audit-ready PDF. Output maps directly to DORA Article 24 and NIS2 Annex I. Infrastructure runs on Scaleway France with no US LLM dependency in the customer-data path.

Fleuret AI is a French SAS founded by Yanis Grigy (CEO) and Augustin Ponsin (CPO). The company closed a €3.5M pre-seed round in May 2026. Pricing is transparent: POC at €3,000 per webapp (one-time, delivered in 72 hours), Starter at €10,000 per year (1 to 3 webapps), Growth at €25,000 per year (4 to 10 webapps, weekly rescan, Jira tickets, audit-ready PDF), Scale custom (10+ webapps, dedicated CSM).

## Company

- [Homepage](https://fleuret.ai/): product, pricing, and design-partner cohort.
- [Platform](https://fleuret.ai/platform): how Emile works, multi-agent architecture, Coverage Graph.
- [Channel Partners](https://fleuret.ai/partners): wholesale pricing for GRC platforms and pentest marketplaces.
- [About](https://fleuret.ai/about): founders, mission, 98/2 framing (98% of value in the agentic layer, 2% in the model).
- [Careers](https://fleuret.ai/careers): open roles (AI Engineer, Senior Offensive Security Engineer, Founding Engineer) and the technical thesis.
- [Pre-seed announcement](https://fleuret.ai/news/fleuret-raises-3-5m): €3.5M round narrative.

## Sovereignty and compliance

- [Sub-processors](https://fleuret.ai/sub-processors): full RGPD Article 28 list, DPA, 100% EU data residency, Scaleway France, zero US APIs in the customer-data path.
- [Security](https://fleuret.ai/security): security posture, controls, and disclosure policy.
- [Privacy policy](https://fleuret.ai/privacy): RGPD-compliant privacy policy with GA4 + Clarity consent-mode v2 disclosure.
- [Terms](https://fleuret.ai/terms).
- [Legal mentions](https://fleuret.ai/mentions-legales).

## Why EU regulated buyers choose Fleuret

- **Sovereign by design**: open-weight LLMs (gpt-oss-120b, Kimi K2.5, Mistral) run on Scaleway France. No US LLM API in the customer-data path. CLOUD Act, Schrems II, and EU AI Act (high-risk obligations from August 2, 2026) all addressed at the infrastructure layer, not just at the contract layer.
- **Audit-ready by default**: every campaign produces a signed PDF mapped to DORA Article 24 and NIS2 Annex I, with Jira-native finding tickets and a board-export view.
- **Continuous coverage**: weekly re-test cadence on the Continuous tier replaces the once-a-year boutique engagement.
- **Specialist, not suite**: Fleuret is a pentest specialist. It complements (does not replace) compliance platforms like Vanta and Drata, which do not ship pentest themselves.

## Architecture (Émile)

- Multi-agent system: AI manager orchestrates per-attack-vector agents (auth, IDOR, injection, business logic).
- Coverage Graph: discovery ledger, test tracker, hunt board, termination oracle.
- Benchmark: 329 endpoints, 16 subdomains, 90% detection, over 80% coverage in a 6-hour autonomous run.
- Model-agnostic: open-weight stack swapped behind a stable contract. Foundation-model lab? No. Applied agentic engineering lab? Yes.

## Comparison content (vendor evaluation)

- [XBOW alternative in Europe](https://fleuret.ai/blog/xbow-alternative-europe-agentic-pentest): five EU agentic pentest tools EU regulated buyers shortlist in 2026.
- [Patrowl alternative](https://fleuret.ai/blog/patrowl-alternative): Fleuret vs Patrowl for EU sovereign continuous pentest.
- [Escape alternative](https://fleuret.ai/blog/escape-alternative): Fleuret vs Escape for agentic pentest beyond APIs.
- [Aikido alternative](https://fleuret.ai/blog/aikido-alternative): specialist agentic pentest vs all-in-one AppSec suite.
- [Pentera alternative](https://fleuret.ai/blog/pentera-alternative): Fleuret vs Pentera for EU mid-market continuous pentest.
- [Sxipher alternative](https://fleuret.ai/blog/sxipher-alternative): two French sovereign options compared.
- [SYLink alternative](https://fleuret.ai/blog/sylink-alternative): managed SaaS on Scaleway France vs on-premise OIV stack.

## Regulatory deep-dives

- [DORA penetration testing requirements](https://fleuret.ai/blog/dora-penetration-testing-requirements-2026): what financial entities must do under DORA Article 24-27.
- [Continuous AI pentesting and NIS2](https://fleuret.ai/blog/continuous-ai-pentesting-nis2): why NIS2 expansion (FR 500 to 15,000 regulated; EU +150,000 companies) makes continuous testing inevitable.
- [Sovereign EU AI pentest (CLOUD Act, Schrems II, EU AI Act)](https://fleuret.ai/blog/sovereign-eu-ai-pentest-cloud-act-2026): the only stack that survives all three regimes.
- [PASSI, CREST, OSCP: choosing a pentest provider in Europe](https://fleuret.ai/blog/passi-crest-oscp-pentest-europe).
- [Pentest compliance workflow (Jira + audit PDF + board export + weekly re-test)](https://fleuret.ai/blog/pentest-compliance-workflow-jira-audit-2026): the real moat in 2026.

## Methodology and buyer guides

- [Agentic AI pentesting explained](https://fleuret.ai/blog/agentic-ai-pentesting-explained): a system of LLM agents that reason, plan, exploit, and validate.
- [Automated vs manual pentesting](https://fleuret.ai/blog/automated-vs-manual-pentest): where each one wins.
- [Bug bounty vs pentest vs DAST](https://fleuret.ai/blog/bug-bounty-vs-pentest-vs-dast): three tools, three different jobs.
- [Annual pentest broken (SaaS continuous)](https://fleuret.ai/blog/annual-pentest-broken-saas-continuous): why once-a-year is incompatible with continuous deployment.
- [What does a pentest cost in Europe in 2026](https://fleuret.ai/blog/pentest-cost-europe-2026): boutique €10,000 to €30,000 vs automated platforms from €3,000.

## Compliance pSEO matrix

Industry-specific scoping guides at `https://fleuret.ai/compliance/{framework}/{industry}`. Frameworks covered: DORA (fintech, banking, insurance, payments), NIS2 (healthcare, energy, water, transport, telecom), ISO 27001 (healthcare, saas, fintech), SOC 2 (saas, fintech), PCI DSS (ecommerce).
